response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories show love.
Love changes minds.
Minds grow wider.
Wider views help.
Helps bring peace.
Peace feels good.
Good days pass.
Pass time fast.
Fast reading works.
Works well here.
Here is math.
Math needs care.
Care brings truth.
Truth shows facts.
Facts prove rates.
Rates stay same.
Same pace holds.
Holds steady flow.
Flow moves pages.
Pages count high.
High numbers add.
Add up sums.
Sums give totals.
Totals reach three.
Three novels done.
Done in time.
Time splits days.
Days count thirty.
Thirty pages daily.
Daily habit forms.
Forms new path.
Path leads far.
Far beyond norms.
